query:
SELECT id, phoneE164, paymentMethodSaved, stripeCustomerId, cardLast4 FROM bldg_users WHERE id = -1;
UPDATE bldg_users SET paymentMethodSaved = 0, stripeCustomerId = NULL, cardLast4 = NULL WHERE id = -1;
